user.title: Domain Watch
user.description: Monitor Certificate Transparency logs for brand impersonation domains.

data_description.keywords: Enter one or more brand keywords to monitor, separated by commas. Keywords are matched as substrings by default. Include % for custom patterns (e.g. mybrand% matches only domains starting with your keyword).
data_description.interval: How often to check for new domains (minimum 1 hour).
How often to check for new domains (minimum 1 hour).
data_description.notify_service: Notification entity ID to call on new detections via notify.send_message (e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone). Leave empty to use automations only.
